overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like intersection in a video game. The scene features heavy traffic, dense crowds of pedestrians, and bright digital billboards on surrounding glass skyscrapers under clear midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major commercial intersection

events.description: spider-sense visual effect appears as blue energy waves on the right building facade, indicating nearby threats or points of interest
Spider-Man shifts from relaxed crouch to alert ready-position on the ledge, preparing for potential action
spider-sense effect dissipates from the right building, returning the scene to normal observation state

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is perched on a building ledge, surveying the busy intersection below while maintaining a crouched, ready stance

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab moving through the intersection below

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with reflective windows towering beside the ledge
concrete building ledge with metal railing where Spider-Man is perched
tall glass building covered with multiple digital advertisement screens
large red digital billboard with white text visible at the end of the street canyon
wide multi-lane intersection filled with vehicles and pedestrian crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man observes a bustling Times Square-like intersection from a high-rise building ledge. The canyon of glass skyscrapers features massive digital billboards and heavy traffic flow below. At 18 seconds, a spider-sense effect ripples across the right building, and Spider-Man shifts to a more alert posture before the effect fades, maintaining watch over the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady observation of a dense urban intersection that shifts from a state of calm surveillance to one of heightened alertness. It begins with the camera positioned behind Spider-Man as he perches on a high-rise ledge, overlooking a canyon of glass skyscrapers filled with massive digital billboards and heavy traffic. As the camera maintains its gaze over the bustling city, a spider-sense ripple suddenly pulses across the adjacent building. This visual disturbance prompts Spider-Man to shift into a more alert posture before the effect fades, leaving him poised and watchful over the sprawling landscape.
